# Asella Organic
> Premium organic health products from the Ethiopian highlands. Cold-processed moringa, black seed oil, turmeric, honey, and traditional wellness remedies.

## Products
- Moringa Powder (200g, 500g, 1kg)
- Black Seed Oil (30ml)
- Turmeric Powder (220g)
- Frankincense Oil (30ml, 60ml)
- Raw Frankincense
- Shilajit (60 tablets, gummies, gel)
- Ashwagandha (60/120 tablets, powder)
- Chia Seeds (250g, 1kg)
- Hibiscus (100g)
- Qasil/Kesil Powder (200g)
- Chebe Powder (100g)
- Myrrh Oil & Powder
- Nila Powder (100g)
- Pumpkin Seeds (100g)
- Cloves, Coffee

## Key Links
- Homepage: https://asellaorganic.com
- Product catalog: https://asellaorganic.com/#products
- Order: via Telegram bot or phone
- Community: https://asellaorganic.com/community-videos

## API
- Base URL: https://api.asellaorganic.com/api
- Products: GET /products
- Orders: POST /orders
